name: gmsh_openfoam_external_aero_bl_v0_2
description: Deterministic Gmsh create-topology prism-layer preset for OpenFOAM external-flow mesher plumbing on the five approved faired-cap aircraft variants.

validated_scope.geometry_set: approved full-path solid faired-cap inlet variants fcv01 through fcv05

boundary_layer_surface_gate.purpose: diagnostic selector input only; current approved variants may fail this diagnostic but still select a passing Gmsh BL mesh setting

rules.condition: top_bad_triangle_cluster starts with tail/ and triangle_aspect_ratio_max > 600
triangle_quality_min < 0.0038 and triangle_aspect_ratio_max > 500 and top_bad_triangle_cluster starts with mid/
triangle_quality_min < 0.004 and top_bad_triangle_cluster starts with mid/ and top_bad_triangle_cluster_count >= 15
surface_faces < 70000 and aspect_gt_60 <= 20 and top_bad_triangle_cluster starts with aft_mid/left_tip

solver_smoke.not_scoring_reason: potentialFoam is inviscid plumbing evidence and does not provide trusted drag/lift

known_limitations: High non-orthogonality remains near sharp trailing-edge and transition regions.
The prism layer currently uses one thin layer and is not a validated wall-model/y-plus strategy.
No-slip steady OpenFOAM scoring is not stable yet.
The selector is evidence-backed for the five approved variants, not a general aircraft-family model.
next_required_work: Persist this preset and all mesh/smoke metrics in optimizer evaluation records.
Add aircraft-only screenshots and severe-face localization as required artifacts for automated runs.
Run bounded no-slip OpenFOAM experiments only under a non-scoring analysis module until force coefficients stabilize.
